title: India's Air Defence System (ADS) and Akashteer
focus: Existing SAM systems (S-400, Barak 8, Akash) and the Akashteer automated control system.
rationale: This section covers India's currently deployed major SAM systems and the newly introduced Akashteer control system, forming a distinct conceptual cluster on active border defense.
sectionExcerpt: India's ADS consists of an Integrated Counter UAS Grid featuring S-400 Triumf (Sudarshan Chakra, 360-degree coverage), Barak 8 (MR/LR SAM, joint India-Israel), and Akash Weapon System (indigenous Short Range SAM with ECCM). Akashteer is India's fully indigenous, automated Air Defence Control and Reporting System developed by BEL, part of the C4ISR framework, featuring AI-driven mobile vehicle-based solutions.
evidenceBullets: S-400 Triumf (Sudarshan Chakra) acquired from Russia offers 360-degree radar and multi-missile compatibility.
Barak 8 is a joint India-Israel MR/LR SAM with maritime and land variants.
Akash is an indigenous short-range SAM with built-in Electronic Counter-Counter Measures (ECCM).
Akashteer is an indigenous, AI-driven, automated Air Defence Control and Reporting System developed by BEL.

title: Integrated Air Defence Weapon System (IADWS) and Indigenous Projects
focus: DRDO's IADWS components (QRSAM, VSHORADS, DEW) and related indigenous initiatives like Project Kusha and Anant Shastra.
rationale: Groups together DRDO's developmental and newly tested integrated systems, including IADWS components, Project Kusha (long-range), and Anant Shastra (QRSAM).
sectionExcerpt: IADWS integrates surveillance, threat identification, and air defense. Components include a Centralized Command Centre (DRDL), QRSAM (DRDO, mobile platform for armoured columns), VSHORADS (RCI, MANPADS for low-altitude threats), and a high-power laser DEW (CHESS). Project Kusha (PGLRSAM) is a DRDO initiative for a long-range air defence missile system (Phase 2 exceeding 600 km). Anant Shastra is an indigenous QRSAM developed by DRDO, BEL, and BDL with a 30 km range.
evidenceBullets: IADWS components include QRSAM (protects moving armoured columns) and VSHORADS (MANPADS for low-altitude threats).
Project Kusha (PGLRSAM) is a DRDO initiative to develop a long-range air defence missile system with interceptors exceeding 600 km range in Phase 2.
Anant Shastra is an indigenous QRSAM system developed by DRDO, BEL, and BDL with a range of around 30 km.
IADWS features a high-power laser-based Directed Energy Weapon (DEW) developed by CHESS.

title: Global Air Defence Systems in News
focus: International air defence systems recently in the news from Israel, USA, and China.
rationale: A clear standalone section listing various international air defence systems, highly suitable for match-the-following type UPSC questions.
sectionExcerpt: Various global air defence systems were in the news. Israel's systems include Iron Dome (short range), David's Sling (short to medium/long), Arrow (long range), and Barak Magen (advanced naval). USA's systems include THAAD (intercepts ballistic missiles), PATRIOT (mobile SAM), and the upcoming Golden Dome (surveillance and interceptor satellites). China's HQ-9 system is inspired by the Russian S-300.
evidenceBullets: Israel's air defence includes Iron Dome (short range), David's Sling, Arrow (long range), and Barak Magen (naval).
USA's THAAD intercepts ballistic missiles, while PATRIOT is a mobile surface-to-air missile defence system.
Golden Dome (USA) is an upcoming system using surveillance and interceptor satellites.
China's HQ-9 system is inspired by the Russian S-300.
